pattern: A recipe is craftable once every one of its ingredients is either a base supply or another already-craftable recipe, so this is a dependency graph where you release a recipe once all its ingredient-dependencies have resolved -- classic topological unlocking, and any ingredient that is neither a supply nor any recipe dooms it forever.
hints: Split each recipe's ingredients into two kinds: raw supplies (always available) and other recipes (a dependency that must be resolved first).
An ingredient that is neither a listed recipe nor a raw supply means that recipe can never be craftable, no matter what else resolves.
Process recipes whose recipe-ingredients have all resolved, the way you would a topological sort: whenever a recipe becomes craftable, that unlocks any other recipe that was waiting on it.

edge_inputs.description: single recipe with all ingredients directly in supply
a recipe that depends on another recipe being made first
missing a raw ingredient makes the recipe permanently uncraftable
two recipes that depend on each other form a cycle and neither can ever be made
one recipe blocked by a missing supply also blocks a recipe that depends on it
some recipes craftable and some not in the same batch
single recipe with a single supply ingredient, minimal case

stress.description: random small recipe/ingredient DAGs mixing craftable chains, missing supplies, and dependency cycles
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    pool = ['item' + str(i) for i in range(n)]
    recipes = pool[:n]
    other_count = rng.randint(0, 30)
    others = ['supply' + str(i) for i in range(other_count)]
    supplies = rng.sample(others, k=rng.randint(0, len(others))) if others else []
    ingredients = []
    for i, r in enumerate(recipes):
        cnt = rng.randint(1, 3)
        candidate_pool = recipes + others
        chosen = rng.sample(candidate_pool, min(cnt, len(candidate_pool)))
        chosen = [c for c in chosen if c != r]
        if not chosen:
            chosen = [others[0]] if others else ['zzz_missing']
        ingredients.append(chosen)
    return [recipes, ingredients, supplies]
